description: Positive case: repeated failed attempts to extract FastAPI routes with grep

input.goals: Audit all API endpoints in a FastAPI codebase and generate a summary with auth requirements per route.
input.trajectory:
1. Used Bash grep to find @app.get/@app.post patterns — got 23 results.
2. Read each of those files to check for auth dependencies — found some routes missing.
3. Realized I missed routes defined in nested APIRouter includes. Ran grep again with different patterns.
4. Got more results but still inconsistent — some routers imported from other modules weren't found.
5. Manually read 12 more files trying to trace APIRouter imports.
6. Repeated the grep with yet another pattern to catch @router.get/@router.post.
7. Still missing routes from a sub-package that re-exports a router.
8. Total: 6 Bash grep calls, 19 Read calls, still not confident I have the full list.
9. Resorted to building the table manually from what I found, knowing it may be incomplete.
